findings.title: Double YAML parsing
findings.description: set_skill_loaded() calls both _load_skill_frontmatter() and _validate_skill_frontmatter() sequentially. Each parses YAML independently wasting ~6.5ms per invocation.

findings.title: TOCTOU race in _validate_skill_frontmatter
findings.description: exists() check at line 245 followed by read_text() at line 252 creates a race condition window.

impact.business_consequence: Exception or stale data under concurrent access

findings.title: TOCTOU race in early-return gate
findings.description: Early return at lines 358-365 based on frontmatter_warnings check could skip valid warnings if frontmatter is added between check and return.

recommendation.action: Always write state when frontmatter_warnings is non-empty

findings.title: Spool scan adds ~15ms per call
findings.description: get_active_turn() calls import_spool_records() which scans up to 200 files every call. Waste since no consumer reads frontmatter_warnings.

recommendation.action: Cache spool import with mtime-based invalidation

findings.title: SQLite lock contention
findings.description: busy_timeout=5000ms with concurrent terminals can exceed limit causing silent fallback to spool.

findings.title: Path mismatch between load and validate
findings.description: _load_skill_frontmatter uses P:/ .claude/skills/ while _validate_skill_frontmatter uses STATE_DIR/skills/. Different paths cause stale validation.

impact.business_consequence: Validation may pass with stale data
